---
title: "Research"
---

## Publications

-   **Jaziri-Arjona, T.** (2021). *Las brechas electorales generacional y urbano-rural en el voto a Vox.* In Oliván Navarro, F. (Eds.), [El toro por los cuernos: Vox, la extrema derecha europea y el voto obrero.](https://www.tecnos.es/libro/semilla-y-surco/el-toro-por-los-cuernos-vox-la-extrema-derecha-europea-y-el-voto-obrero-fidel-olivan-navarro-9788430981212/) Tecnos.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Working Projects

-   **Jaziri-Arjona, T.** *Social Networks and the Educational Gap between Early and Late New Party Voters*

-   **Jaziri-Arjona, T.** & Valentim, V. *Mobility, Reference Group Change, and the Spread of Political Norms: How Summer Holidays normalize the Radical Right in Spain*

-   **Jaziri-Arjona, T**. & De Jong, J. *Clusters of Radical Politics? Heterogeneous Social Networks as a Safeguard against the Radical Right*

-   Zinober, I. & **Jaziri-Arjona, T.** *Local Female Political Representation and the Gender Gap in Voting for the Greens*

-   Lopez-Uroz, N., Chazottes, R., & Jaziri-Arjona, T., *No rain in sight - The electoral effect of water restrictions in France*

-   **Jaziri-Arjona, T.** & Hix, S. The Electoral Consequences of Immigrants Enfranchasiment
